hero_image_alt: An elevated view of a New Hampshire notch in the White Mountains, with peak autumn foliage covering the mountainsides above a lake and a winding road.
services_footnote: Add additional people, extra event coverage, more edited images, or 48-hour rush delivery anytime. Seasonal 15-minute mini sessions run throughout the year — reach out to see what's currently available.
services_heading: Sessions for every season of life.
minis_body_after: mini sessions — a warm, no-pressure way for families and individuals to have their stories captured, no matter the budget. Great photos, made approachable.
portfolio_blurb: Seven bodies of work — each one a different kind of story, photographed with the same honest, unhurried approach.
about_photo_alt: Meredith Lewis at the Mt. Washburn summit sign, camera in hand.

testimonials.quote: Meredith was amazing to work with! She gave us enough direction so we knew the photo she was wanting but left enough room for it to feel natural and capture the essence of the love in our family. She was especially great with our two year old- absolutely nailed singing wheels on the bus to him to keep him smiling and capture his attention! We will definitely get more photos done in the future with her
testimonials.author: Megan Rose Maguire

testimonials.quote: I have the great fortune to work with Meredith for both my son's senior pictures and for a senior night soccer shoot. I can begin to express my pleasure with her work. She was able to get my son to relax and take great senior photos. So much so it was hard to pick one! So many great pictures. For the senior night, she took great pictures of all the seniors and their families during an emotional time. She captured the moment beautifully. I would whole heartedly recommend her for any task! Great job, great photographer, great person!
testimonials.author: Susan Gagner

testimonials.quote: Meredith took our engagement pictures last summer and then she took pictures at my bridal shower. Working with her was so easy and we spent a lot of time laughing and just really having a great time. My now husband and I are somewhat awkward when we have our pictures taken, but Meredith made it easy! She had great ideas and the photos turned out AMAZING!! We are due with our first baby in December and I have already talked with Meredith about taking maternity photos! I'm so excited! Meredith is fun, professional and TALENTED! Thank you, Meredith! You're the best!
testimonials.author: Abby Pelletier

testimonials.quote: Our family recently participated in a mini session with Meredith, and it was an amazing experience. With two little ones under 2, we weren't quite sure what to expect, but Meredith made the entire process so enjoyable. She was incredibly patient and kind, providing simple, clear directions that helped us capture beautiful moments. What truly stood out was Meredith's flexibility and quick thinking. Our toddler wasn't too keen on some of the poses, but Meredith seamlessly adjusted and found ways to keep our toddler engaged and happy. The final photos were absolutely stunning! They're the perfect keepsake for our first family photos as a family of four. We can't wait for more sessions with Meredith in the future!
testimonials.author: Emily Goldman

testimonials.quote: 110% recommend! Meredith went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable with all poses. She not only asked my consent but my fiancé as well. She was fun, energetic and anyone that can make my fiancé laugh and naturally smile in photos gets my stamp of approval. Will definitely be working with Meredith again!
testimonials.author: Alyssa Stinson

testimonials.quote: Meredith was great to work with, she has a great eye and took photos that captured the moment with my horses but were also artistic and caught their presence. She's so talented!
testimonials.author: Jessica Freiman Dressage, LLC

testimonials.quote: We have worked with Meredith twice this summer; once for minis, and once for senior photos. Not only are we thrilled with the photos themselves, but working with Meredith was a breeze before the appointments, and during the sessions she was wonderful. I highly, highly recommend working with her!
testimonials.author: Shelby Harlow Lackie

testimonials.quote: My husband and I recently had Meredith do a photo session with us at the Hamilton House here in South Berwick, Maine. She was wonderful! Very kind and patient, as we are 83 and 75 years old and I had back surgery pending. We were very pleased with the photos she took and have already had Christmas cards made with some of our favorite shots. Would highly recommend her to anyone looking to do photos.
testimonials.author: Marjorie Brown

cta_image_alt: A loon stretching its wings on a calm lake, water droplets falling from its feathers.
testimonials_heading: From the people I've worked with.
about_paragraphs: I'm a New Hampshire based photographer rooted in the picturesque White Mountains. My passion behind the camera is capturing candid, meaningful moments that feel genuine — the real, raw emotion of your story.
Whether it's a quiet in-between glance or a big joyful milestone, my goal is to tell your story in a way that feels true to you, all while keeping my photography approachable and affordable.
I believe everyone deserves the chance to have their photos taken — and I hope you'll give me that chance. Welcome to my website, and to the place I'm lucky to call home.
minis_body_before: I believe the moments that matter most shouldn't be out of reach. That's why I host seasonal
services_blurb: Every one-hour session includes 10 edited digital images of your choice, hand-picked from a gallery of at least 30.
cta_text: Whether it's a milestone, a celebration, or an ordinary day worth remembering — I'd love to hear from you.
hero_heading: Capturing the candid & heartfelt moments throughout the White Mountains of New Hampshire.
